# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_TYPE', defaultValue: 'jar', description: 'Type of artifact (jar, war, zip, etc)')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS', defaultValue: 'server1:8080,server2:8080', description: 'Comma separated list of production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Path to deploy artifacts on production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy', description: 'User to deploy artifacts')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactName = "artifact.${params.ARTIFACT_TYPE}"
                    sh "curl -L -o ${artifactName} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    sh "ls -la ${artifactName}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def artifactName = "artifact.${params.ARTIFACT_TYPE}"
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        def (host, port) = server.split(':')
                        sh """
                            ssh ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host} "mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                            scp ${artifactName} ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${artifactName}
                            ssh ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host} "chmod +x ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${artifactName}"
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed'
        }
    }
}
